summary: Extend the M4 direct AI client with cancellable SSE-style streaming for OpenAI-compatible, Anthropic, and local response envelopes while preserving key redaction and provider-specific request headers.

decisions.decision: Expose provider streaming as an async generator of text deltas, parse only data events, stop on [DONE], and cancel the reader in finally while passing the caller AbortSignal to fetch.
decisions.rationale: FR-10.7 requires streaming with cancel; keeping transport deltas application-owned allows the conversation reducer to remain provider-neutral and keeps malformed events fail-closed.

testEvidence.criterion: The streaming client test fails when its client module is absent and passes for two OpenAI deltas, [DONE] termination, stream=true request framing, and AbortSignal forwarding.
testEvidence.test: Run the focused AI client suite once against the deliberate missing-module RED state, then against the implementation.

red.outcome: RED: Test Files 1 failed; module ../../../src/application/ai/ai-client was not found; exit 1.

green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 1 passed (1); Tests 8 passed (8); Duration 568ms.

testEvidence.criterion: The extended provider client remains type-safe and source-policy clean.
testEvidence.test: Run TypeScript and repository lint/source policy once after the streaming implementation.

red.outcome: RED: with ai-client.ts deliberately removed, TypeScript reported TS2307 for the AI client test import and exited 2.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; pnpm.cmd lint
green.outcome: GREEN: TypeScript exited 0; Checked 422 files in 234ms with source policy passed.

questions: Provider-specific retry/backoff and UI markdown rendering remain outside this transport unit; no claim is made that the full C10 UI exit gate is closed.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
